case_title: SECRETARTY, UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT vs. SMITH, CLOVIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, CLOVIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1001 SUNNYDALE AVE #1613A SAN FRANCISCO CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CLOVIA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CLOVIA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CLOVIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CLOVIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT SERVED OCT-21-1993, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CLOVIA
